report.summary: Standup v6 Apr 4: Since v5 — full 6-agent rotation completed (build-v5, design-v4, community-v6, eod-v5, publish-v4 + standup). Build-v5 shipped Bittensor TAO + Starknet STARK guides. Publish-v4 promoted 5 tool pages (defi-risk-scorer, token-unlock-calendar, protocol-revenue, perp-funding, sentiment-heatmap) — published count now 702. Staging at 126 learn pages. F&G recovers to 29 (from 8). BTC ~$66,870. 131 uncommitted files in prod. Deploy remains P0 blocker — 38th escalation.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE v5 → v6: Full 6-agent rotation completed. build-v5 (Bittensor TAO + Starknet STARK guides), design-v4 (2 OG SVGs + accessibility fixes for both new pages), community-v6 (tweets #520-524, newsletter v57, 3 social cards — F&G rebound, Ripple OCC, Australia framework), eod-v5 (QA verified both new pages pass metadata+JSON-LD), publish-v4 (promoted 5 tool pages from orphan pool).

PUBLISHED PAGES: 704 entries in published-pages.ts (cryptodegen prod repo). Publish-v4 promoted 5 tool pages (defi-risk-scorer, token-unlock-calendar, protocol-revenue, perp-funding, sentiment-heatmap) in the Degen0x staging workspace — reported count: 702. 131 uncommitted files in prod repo.

STAGING CONTENT: 126 learn page directories with page.tsx in Degen0x staging. 1,251 total page.tsx files across cryptodegen prod. 18 learn guides built today across 5 build cycles. Latest 2: Bittensor TAO (~3,200 words, 861 lines) + Starknet STARK (~3,000 words, 814 lines).
QUEUE STATUS: PUBLISH_QUEUE exhausted — 2 entries remain (monad-guide, zora — both need page.tsx). Publish agent pivoted to orphan pool (~638 available pages). Queue refill needed.

COMMUNITY OUTPUT (since v5): 5 tweets (#520-524) covering F&G rebound 8→29, Ripple National Trust Bank + OCC rule, negative gamma alert at $68K, Australia Digital Assets Framework, weekend signal roundup. Newsletter v57 'Fear Just Blinked'. 3 new social card SVGs. Discord/Telegram weekly announcement drafted.

DESIGN OUTPUT (since v5): 2 OG images (og-bittensor-tao.svg, og-starknet-stark-guide.svg). Accessibility improvements: focus-visible outlines, prefers-reduced-motion, aria-labels on both new pages. 106+ learn pages still missing OG images.

MARKET (live search data): BTC ~$66,870 (flat 24h, -0.82%). F&G Index: 29/100 — Fear (up from 28 yesterday, 25 last week, ATL of 5 in Feb). First sustained exit from Extreme Fear after 60+ day streak. Crypto market cap $2.38T. Stablecoins $316B ATH. OCC digital asset custody rule now live. Australia comprehensive crypto framework now live.
EGRESS: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, GSC, Vercel. Market data confirmed via web search. No live traffic delta available.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SINCE v5: Full rotation — build-v5 (2 guides), design-v4 (2 OG images + a11y), community-v6 (5 tweets + newsletter v57 + 3 SVGs), eod-v5 (QA on 2 new pages), publish-v4 (5 tool pages promoted).
TODAY'S TOTAL: 27 agent runs (standup×6, build×5, community×6, design×4, eod×5, publish×1). $2,291 human-equivalent cost. This is standup #6 today.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (38TH ESCALATION): Production frozen at e3f63fc since Apr 2. 131 uncommitted files in prod repo. 704 published slugs in registry, 126 staging learn pages, 18 guides built today — all invisible to users and crawlers. Design's SEO bug fix (use client + metadata conflict) on 4 pages still undeployed. Content velocity is extraordinary but delivery to Google = ZERO. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

P1 — QUEUE REFILL + SCAFFOLD: PUBLISH_QUEUE exhausted. Scaffold page.tsx for monad-guide and zora. Then refill queue with 20-50 pages from ~638 orphan inventory. 5 tool pages promoted this cycle via orphan pool workaround.
P2 — SEO BUG: jupiter-dex-aggregator still has 'use client' + metadata export conflict (1 remaining). 4/5 pages patched in prior cycle.

P3 — TECHNICAL DEBT: 111 phantom published slugs (missing page.tsx → 404s). 141 TS errors in 4 files (non-blocking). 0/6 API routes rate-limited. 2/6 routes with fallback data. 106+ learn pages missing OG images. Protocol logos directory empty.
P4 — CARRY-OVER: mev-guide and solana-vs-ethereum warn status. defi-yields API hardening deferred.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, 38TH ESCALATION): 131 uncommitted files. 18 guides built today. 5 tool pages promoted. Newsletter + tweets ready. SEO bug fixes waiting. F&G recovering to 29 — first sustained exit from Extreme Fear = returning risk appetite = returning search demand. OCC custody rule + Australia framework = institutional credibility narratives live NOW. Deploy captures all of this simultaneously. Every hour uncommitted = compounding freshness decay. This is a $0 action with maximum ROI.

PRIORITY 2 — QUEUE REFILL + BULK PUBLISH: Queue exhausted. 638 orphan pages available. Refill with 50-page batch targeting high-value categories (tools, exchanges, compare pages). Scaffold monad-guide + zora page.tsx. Keep publish agent productive next cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — OG IMAGE BULK GENERATION: 106+ learn pages missing OG images. Social sharing and CTR impact. Design agent can batch-generate 10-20 per cycle. Combined with deploy, this would meaningfully improve social card appearance across search results and link previews.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $2,291 (27 runs: standup×6=$270, build×5=$1,165, community×6=$246, design×4=$240, eod×5=$315, publish×1=$55)

report.email: Resend API blocked by browser CORS (Failed to fetch from degen0x.com context). Consistent with all prior cycles. Report saved to reports/ folder in both workspaces.
